plain_english_brief: BlackRock and Franklin Templeton added $150M to BNB Chain RWA positions this week. Narrative momentum for RWA tokens is at 78/100 while Fear & Greed improved to 62. Rotate 20% into ONDO with a weekly rebalance cadence.

strategy_spec.recommendation: Rotate 20% into ONDO and BUIDL on BNB Chain
strategy_spec.entry_condition: RWA TVL on BSC > $600M AND Fear & Greed > 50 AND narrative score > 70
strategy_spec.exit_condition: RWA TVL drops 15% week-over-week OR Fear & Greed falls below 35 OR institutional inflow reverses
strategy_spec.reasoning: Strong institutional inflow ($926M RWA TVL on BNB Chain) + improving sentiment (Fear & Greed at 62) + strong RWA narrative momentum (78/100) = 3/4 signals aligned with moderate macro regime. Risk-on conditions justify 20% rotation into primary RWA tokens.
